---
title: "Ben Hsu"
image: "files/IMG_3749.JPG"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:b5hsu@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/benresearcher/
    - icon: line
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/benresearcher/
---

## Education

University of California, San Diego | San Diego, CA |
MS Business Analytics | Jul 2025 - Dec 2026

National Taiwan University | Taipei, Taiwan |
B.A in Business Administration | Sep 2012 - June 2016

## Experience

LINE Plus Corporation | Product Strategy Analyst | Oct 2021 - May 2025

Ipsos | Senior Research Executive | Sep 2019 - Sep 2021


### What I work on

I work at the intersection of data science and business decision-making. My focus areas include pricing analytics, demand forecasting, experimentation, customer segmentation, and text-based modeling. I care about building models that are interpretable, testable, and deployable under real-world constraints.
